track_focus: Structural isomorphisms from distant knowledge domains

findings.title: No task-criticality taxonomy protecting judgment-critical agents from cost-driven model reassignment
findings.fix_scope: new config file agent-tiers.yaml + safety floor in expansion.md Step 2.2c

findings.title: Synthesis destroys model provenance — cross-model corroboration and disagreement are untracked
findings.fix_scope: 2-line schema addition to findings.json + Rule 1 dedup clause in synthesize.md

findings.title: Synthesis makes no judgment call on cross-model conflicts — hallmark left unstamped
findings.fix_scope: judgment mandate addition to intersynth:synthesize-review prompt

findings.title: No failure isolation for Bash-dispatched OpenRouter agents — API timeout stalls flux-watch.sh
findings.fix_scope: timeout + error-stub wrapper in OpenRouter dispatch Bash script

findings.title: Uniform Claude-designed prompt templates will produce prompt monoculture in non-Claude models
All model tiers dispatch simultaneously — no cost-ordered staging where cheap models inform expensive dispatch
findings.fix_scope: cheap_first mode in budget.yaml + 60s wait window in Stage 2 dispatch

improvements.title: Model blind-spot profiles accumulated empirically per model family
Baseline disagreement profiles for model pairs to distinguish ombak from noise
Finding density tracking per model tier to detect cheap-model underperformance
Context budget check against model context window before OpenRouter dispatch
Model version pinning in routing config + periodic capability probe

P1-B.note: Cross-domain convergence on synthesis provenance gap

P1-E.note: Cross-domain convergence on prompt monoculture risk

meta_pattern: Diversity-capture problem: heterogeneous participant value is only realized if the system explicitly preserves and amplifies heterogeneity rather than standardizing inputs, aggregating outputs without provenance, or routing by the wrong signal.
